stemHtml: An aircraft subject to unlawful seizure has landed. What is the appropriate course of action by the State?

options.a: Restrain the aircraft on the ground except if it is life-threatening for people.
options.b: Maintain the airplane on the ground in any case.
options.c: Allow the airplane to proceed to its next scheduled flight immediately.
options.d: Provide clearance for the airplane to vacate the airport without delay.
